allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Bounds.Width, $screen.Bounds.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Bounds.Size\); $bmp.Save\("c:\\_PROJECTS\\AI Test1\\shot-screen.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "Screenshot saved")

PowerShell(cd "c:\\_PROJECTS\\AI Test1"; $env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE = $null; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe" -ArgumentList "dist\\infrastructure\\main.js" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\_PROJECTS\\AI Test1" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $proc | Select-Object Id, HasExited)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Bounds.Width, $screen.Bounds.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Bounds.Size\); $bmp.Save\("c:\\_PROJECTS\\AI Test1\\shot-app.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); "done")

PowerShell(cd "c:\\_PROJECTS\\AI Test1"; $env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE = $null; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe" -ArgumentList "dist\\infrastructure\\main.js","--remote-debugging-port=9222" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\_PROJECTS\\AI Test1" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Output "PID: $\($proc.Id\), HasExited: $\($proc.HasExited\)")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Name "electron" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; cd "c:\\_PROJECTS\\AI Test1"; $env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE = $null; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe" -ArgumentList "dist\\infrastructure\\main.js","--remote-debugging-port=9222" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\_PROJECTS\\AI Test1" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; "PID: $\($proc.Id\), HasExited: $\($proc.HasExited\)")
